message:
test(demo): comprehensive E2E and integration tests

New test files:
- async_tasks_e2e.rs: Async tasks E2E tests
- async_tasks_stress.rs: Stress testing for async tasks
- async_tasks_ux_a11y.rs: UX and accessibility tests for async tasks
- drag_drop_e2e.rs: Drag and drop E2E tests
- log_search_e2e.rs: Log search E2E tests
- modal_e2e.rs: Modal dialog E2E tests
- mouse_playground_e2e.rs: Mouse playground E2E tests
- undo_e2e.rs: Undo system E2E tests
- virtualized_search_e2e.rs: Virtualized search E2E tests

Updated tests:
- form_validation_e2e.rs: Enhanced form validation tests
- macro_recorder_determinism.rs: Improved determinism tests
- macro_recorder_e2e.rs: Extended macro recorder tests
